creator: Alexander Terp
description:
The metadata display slot is documented in custom-fields.md and configuration.md (and thus llms-full.txt) as a working feature, but no rendering code exists for it. This led to a bug report from someone who configured it based on the LLM docs.

Strip all metadata references from user-facing docs. Leave the Go struct field and validation code in place (inert) for potential future use.

Files to update:
- web/src/docs/custom-fields.md
- web/src/docs/configuration.md
- docs/COMPAT.md
- Regenerate internal/api/dist/
title: Remove metadata from card_display docs
